analytics._note: PostHog, baked into the template so every customer site ships with analytics. One shared AlignCompass project; the slug is registered as a super-property so events filter per customer. Cookieless (memory persistence) so no consent banner is required. The apiKey is the PUBLIC project key — safe to embed. The build leaves this as-is.

seo.title: Put What You Can't Get To on Autopilot | AlignCompass
seo.description: You're great with customers — you just can't answer with your hands full. AlignCompass texts back missed calls, re-books past customers, and gets you reviews. Pay when it works.
seo.h1: Do the work you love. We'll catch everything you can't get to.
keywords: missed call text back for contractors
done for you marketing for trades

sections.eyebrow: For owners who love the work — and the customers
sections.headline: Do the work you love. We'll catch everything you can't get to.
sections.subhead: You're under a house, mid-contract, elbow-deep in a furnace — you can't answer every call, chase every old customer, or ask for every review. So we put all of it on autopilot: missed calls texted back in seconds, past customers re-booked, reviews handled — landing right in the system you already use. Your website's free. You only pay once it pays for itself.

image.alt: Home-service owner working a job while a new booking notification lights up the phone in their hand

sections.heading: You can't be two places at once. Right now that's costing you.
items: Miss a handful of calls a week and that's easily a thousand dollars walking to whoever picked up — about 85% of people who hit your voicemail never call back.
The customers you already wowed forget your name within a year and call a competitor — even though they were yours to keep.
Every review you didn't get around to asking for is a customer who picks the shop with more stars than you.

sections.heading: Everything you can't get to, handled.

items.title: Answer every call — even the ones you miss
items.body: The second you can't pick up, the caller gets a real text back: "Sorry we missed you — what do you need?" Not a robot answering the phone. Nobody replies to those. People reply to a text. The job stays yours instead of going to the next name on the list.

items.title: Wake up the customers you already earned
items.body: They're sitting in your spreadsheet or your Jobber. You should call them — but who has the time? We warm them up first by text and email, so the ones who are ready raise their hand. Then you spend your time only on the customers who actually want to book.

items.title: Get more 5-star reviews — and stop the bad ones cold
items.body: Reviews are how you keep winning. After a good job your customer gets a one-tap ask, so you never leave a five-star on the table. And if someone's unhappy, we catch it privately — before it ever lands in public.

items.title: Bring back the work that repeats
items.body: The tune-up they need in six months. The service that comes due every year. We nudge them at the right moment, so repeat work shows up on your calendar without a contract — and without you chasing it.

items.title: Need something custom? We build it.
items.body: We've built booking apps where customers pick their passengers and bags and the next driver gets pinged to accept the ride — round-robin, automatic. We write blogs that pull homeowners in. If it gets you more booked work, we'll build it. (Social media isn't our thing right now — we'll always tell you straight what we do and don't do.)

sections.heading: We're picky about who we work with — in a good way.
sections.empathy: We're not for the owner who hates dealing with people and wants a machine to run the whole thing. We're for you: the one who loves your customers and takes pride in the work — you just can't do it with your hand in a furnace or your name on a contract. Your cousin isn't answering the phone. A front desk is a payroll you don't want yet. So what do you do? You put your business on autopilot. You handle everything you can — and the moment you can't get to something, that's where we come in.
authority: Pay-when-it-works — you don't pay until it covers itself (about 60 days)
Everything shows up as real booked jobs in the system you already use — not impressions
Built and run by a working business analyst, not a template reseller
We do 100% of the setup, and your customers and data stay yours

image.alt: Phone screen showing a booked job traced back to a recovered missed call

sections.heading: Getting started is the easy part.

steps.title: We build your free site and switch on call recovery
steps.body: A fast website that gets you found on Google — free — and an instant text back on every call you can't grab.

steps.title: We bring your past customers back to life
steps.body: We pull your list for you — most owners can't export it themselves — then warm them up so the ready ones come back first.

steps.title: The work lands where you already work
steps.body: Recovered calls, re-booked customers, new reviews, repeat jobs — all in the tools you already use. Point at a job and say, "that one came from the system."

sections.heading: Why the work you're already earning is leaking — and how we plug it

items.title: The demand is already yours. You're just losing it to a gap in your day.
items.body: Most local service businesses miss somewhere between a fifth and a third of their inbound calls — and solo operators miss far more, because you're on the job, not by the phone. Of the people who reach voicemail, about 85% never call back. That's not a problem you fix by buying more leads; it's a capture problem. On top of that, roughly 43% of a typical customer list has gone quiet — 18+ months with no booking — even though re-booking a past customer converts at 60–70%, versus 5–20% for a cold lead. And since the Google Map Pack drives over half of local-service search traffic, being easy to find and instant to answer is where booked jobs actually come from. AlignCompass plugs every leak: missed-call text-back so no caller slips away, reactivation so your own list goes back to work, and review and repeat-work automations that keep the flywheel turning — all measured in real booked jobs, not impressions.

sections.heading: The two questions every owner asks

items.q: "I already stay busy enough — why do I need this?"
items.a: Because busy and full aren't the same. You're still missing calls while you work, still letting past customers go cold, still leaving reviews unasked. This isn't more leads — it's keeping the business you already earn, and you see it as booked jobs, not a vague promise.
Only if it makes you money. The website's free, and you don't pay for the engine until it books enough to cover itself — about 60 days. If it doesn't pay for itself, you don't pay.

sections.heading: Simple pricing. You don't pay until it works.
includes: Free SEO website + Google Business Profile — yours to keep
Repeat-work reminders for tune-ups and recurring service
Booked-job attribution in your own system
We do all the setup — including pulling your customer list for you
Founding clients pay near cost for the first few slots in exchange for a testimonial

sections.heading: Want to see what you're leaving on the table?
sections.body: Book a free 15-minute call, or get a free missed-revenue audit that shows — in your own numbers — what unanswered calls and a cold customer list are costing you.

seo.title: What We Do: Capture, Reactivate, Automate | AlignCompass
seo.description: AlignCompass handles the work you can't get to: missed-call text-back, past-customer reactivation, automated reviews, repeat-work reminders, and custom builds — measured in booked jobs.
seo.h1: Everything we do points at one thing: more booked jobs.
keywords: custom booking app for service business

sections.headline: Everything we do points at one thing: more booked jobs.
sections.subhead: We catch the calls you miss, wake up the customers you already earned, keep the reviews coming, and bring back the work that repeats. The capture engine is the core — and when you need something custom, we build it.

image.alt: A service business calendar filling up with booked jobs over the week

sections.heading: The core engine

items.title: Get found
items.body: The problem: you don't show up when neighbors search for what you do. What we do: build you a fast, SEO-strong website and dial in your Google Business Profile. The outcome: you show up first when someone nearby needs you — and the site is free.

items.title: Answer every call — even the ones you miss
items.body: The problem: you're on a job, the phone rings, and the caller is gone before you surface. What we do: every missed call gets a real text back in seconds — not a robot — plus reminders that cut no-shows. The outcome: the job doesn't go to the next guy on the list.

items.title: Wake up your past customers
items.body: The problem: the customers you already served drift to whoever markets to them next. What we do: warm up your list by text and email so the ready ones raise their hand. The outcome: old jobs turn into new ones — and you only call the people who actually want to book.

items.title: Get more reviews, catch the bad ones
items.body: The problem: your best jobs never turn into the reviews that win the next customer. What we do: a one-tap review ask after every good job, with unhappy customers routed to you privately first. The outcome: more 5-star reviews, fewer public surprises.

items.title: Bring back the work that repeats
items.body: The problem: tune-ups and yearly service quietly slip because nobody reminds the customer. What we do: timed "you're due" nudges to the right people at the right moment. The outcome: recurring revenue without a contract and without you chasing it.

sections.heading: Need something custom? We build that too.

items.title: Custom booking apps
items.body: Real software when you need it. We've built booking apps where customers choose passengers and bags, then the next available driver gets pinged to accept the ride — round-robin, automatic. If your business needs a way for customers to book and your team to dispatch, we'll build it.

items.title: Business automations
items.body: The follow-up before an appointment. The reminder six months later. The "thanks for your business" that quietly asks for the next job. We wire up the little touches that win repeat work — so they happen whether or not you remember.

items.title: Content that pulls customers in
items.body: We write blogs that bring homeowners to you before they even pick up the phone — so you're the name they already trust when something breaks. (Social media isn't part of what we do right now — we'll tell you straight.)

sections.heading: One price for the whole engine.
includes: Free SEO website + Google Business Profile
Booked-job attribution in your own system
Done-for-you setup, including your customer-list export

sections.heading: Not sure where the leaks are?
sections.body: Start with a free missed-revenue audit — we'll show you, in your own numbers, what's slipping away. Head to the Free Audit page to get yours.

seo.title: Free Missed-Revenue Audit | AlignCompass
seo.description: See what missed calls and a cold customer list are costing you — in your own numbers. Free, no obligation. Get your missed-revenue audit from AlignCompass.
seo.h1: See exactly what you're leaving on the table — for free.
keywords: missed call cost calculator for contractors
how much do missed calls cost

sections.headline: See exactly what you're leaving on the table — for free.
sections.subhead: Most owners have no idea how much a few missed calls a week and a quiet customer list really cost. We'll show you the number — in your own math, not someone else's case study.

image.alt: Simple worksheet showing calls received, calls missed, and dollars lost per week

sections.heading: What you'll get

items.title: Your missed-call math
items.body: Calls in vs. calls missed, turned into a real weekly dollar figure for your business.

items.title: Your dormant-list value
items.body: An estimate of how much repeat work is sitting cold in the customers you already served.

items.title: The recoverable number
items.body: What an always-on system could realistically put back on your calendar — and how fast.

sections.heading: How the audit works

steps.title: Tell us a few numbers
steps.body: Roughly how many calls you get a week, and about how big your past-customer list is. Two minutes.

steps.title: We run the math
steps.body: We turn it into your real missed-revenue figure — no fluff, no vanity metrics.

steps.title: You decide
steps.body: Keep the numbers and do nothing, or book a free call to plug the leaks. No pressure.

sections.heading: Get your free missed-revenue audit
sections.body: Send us a few numbers and we'll come back with your figure. No obligation, no sales pressure.

sections.heading: Quick questions

items.a: Yes. No cost, no obligation, no card. You get the numbers whether or not we ever work together.

items.q: Will I get hounded with sales calls?
items.a: No. We send you the figure. If you want to talk, you book a call — on your terms.

items.q: What if my numbers are rough guesses?
items.a: Perfect. Ballpark is enough — the math still shows you the scale of what's slipping away.

seo.title: AlignCompass FAQ | Pricing, Guarantee & How It Works
seo.description: Answers on pricing, the pay-when-it-works guarantee, what's included, and how AlignCompass recovers missed calls, re-books past customers, and automates reviews.
seo.h1: Questions owners ask before they say yes.

sections.headline: Questions owners ask before they say yes.
sections.subhead: Straight answers on pricing, the guarantee, and exactly how this works — no jargon.

items.q: I already stay busy. Why do I need this?
items.a: Busy and full aren't the same. While you're working you're still missing calls, still letting past customers go cold, still leaving reviews unasked. We capture all of it, and you see it as booked jobs in your own system — not a vague promise.

items.q: Is this just another recurring fee that creeps onto my card?
items.a: Only if it makes you money. The website's free, and you don't pay for the engine until it books enough to cover itself — about 60 days. If it never pays for itself, you don't pay. That's the whole deal.
$297/mo plus a one-time setup of about $500–800. Founding clients pay near cost for the first few slots in exchange for a testimonial.

items.q: Isn't this just an AI robot answering my phone?
items.a: No. Nobody wants a robot picking up — and nobody replies to one. When you miss a call, the caller gets a real text back in seconds, so the conversation actually starts. People answer texts.

We build the free site, switch on missed-call recovery, reactivate your list, and turn on reviews. If that doesn't book enough to pay for itself in roughly 60 days, you don't start paying until it does.

items.q: What do I actually have to do?
items.a: Almost nothing. We do 100% of the setup — including pulling your customer list for you, which most owners can't export themselves. Your only job is replying to a one-tap text after a good job.

items.q: How fast will I see results?
items.a: Often within the first week — the first recovered call can land quickly, and a reactivation blast to your existing list is fast cash once we import it. Text-back goes live as soon as carrier approval clears.

items.q: Can you build something custom for my business?
items.a: Often, yes. Beyond the core engine we've built booking apps, dispatch tools, automations and blogs. If it gets you more booked work and it's a fit, we'll scope it with you honestly.

We're a newer operation building our first founding-client results right now, so we lead with your own numbers — a free audit that shows what you're losing — rather than someone else's case study. The mechanisms are well-proven across the industry, and we back the whole thing with pay-when-it-works.

items.q: Who owns my website and my data?
items.a: You do. The site is yours to keep, and your customer data stays yours — always.

sections.heading: Still have a question?
sections.body: Book a free call, or just email us — we answer straight.
